entry.title: Lissy93 closed a pull request in awesome-privacy
entry.content:
Lissy93 closed Lissy93/awesome-privacy#528 · May 1, 2026 15:31
Add qrbake (privacy-respecting QR code generator) #528

Add qrbake to Security Tools > Online Tools

qrbake is a free QR code generator that runs entirely in the browser. Codes (URLs, Wi-Fi credentials, v…

+9 -0
2 comments
